description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow with a flat roof, set on a rectangular grassy plot. The front facade features a central entrance with a paved walkway flanked by neatly trimmed hedges. The structure includes a private, fenced backyard area with wooden paneling and a small garden, as well as an outdoor hot tub. Large windows and doors are distributed asymmetrically, providing natural light to the interior rooms. The exterior walls are primarily brick, with some sections finished in white, and the roof is flat and unobtrusive. The overall design is modern and functional, with clear separation between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story brick bungalow with a flat roof, fenced backyard, and central entrance flanked by hedges. Features include large windows, a private garden, and an outdoor hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, hedges, and partial interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, backyard fencing, and outdoor hot tub area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full extent of the wooden backyard fence and garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fenced garden, flat roof, and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with scattered windows on all sides
